hooks.command: git fetch --all --prune --quiet 2>/dev/null; branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); behind=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo 0); ahead=$(git rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); upstream=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} 2>/dev/null || echo none); upstream_gone=$(git for-each-ref --format='%(upstream:track)' "refs/heads/$branch" 2>/dev/null | grep -c gone); stash=$(git stash list 2>/dev/null | wc -l); dirty=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); diverged=$(git diff main...HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); printf '[git-sync] branch=%s behind_main=%s ahead_main=%s dirty=%s diverged=%s upstream=%s upstream_gone=%s stash=%s\n' "$branch" "$behind" "$ahead" "$dirty" "$diverged" "$upstream" "$upstream_gone" "$stash"; if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo "[git-sync] NOTE: on main branch ŌĆö create a feature branch before editing (feat/fix/chore/refactor/docs/test/)"; fi; if [ "$behind" -gt 0 ] && [ "$branch" != "main" ]; then echo "[git-sync] WARNING: main has $behind new commits ŌĆö consider rebase before continuing"; fi; if [ "$upstream_gone" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[git-sync] WARNING: upstream branch deleted on remote ŌĆö likely already merged, delete local branch"; fi; if [ "$dirty" -gt 15 ]; then echo "[git-sync] WARNING: $dirty uncommitted files ŌĆö possible branch scope drift, verify all changes match current branch intent before new edits"; fi

node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); const f=d.tool_response?.filePath || d.tool_input?.file_path || ''; if(f) console.log(f);" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }

calls=$(ls ~/.claude/projects/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l); stash=$(git stash list 2>/dev/null | wc -l); dirty=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "[session-end] dirty=$dirty stash=$stash"; if [ "$dirty" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[session-end] WARNING: uncommitted changes ŌĆö run /git-commit before closing"; fi; echo "[cache-tip] ļŗżņØī harness sprint ņŗ£ņ×æ ņĀä /clear ĻČīņ×ź ŌĆö ņ║Éņŗ£ TTL 5ļČä ņ┤łĻ│╝ ņŗ£ cold hit ļ░£ņāØ"
